test.name: UAT-001 : Login and Go to Report (Super Slow)

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: เดินทางร่วมกัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล']
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'bambam' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล']'.
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล']
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=(//button[contains(@class, 'bg-red-600') and contains(., 'รายงาน')])[1]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.arg: xpath=(//button[contains(@class, 'bg-red-600') and contains(., 'รายงาน')])[1]
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: document.evaluate("(//button[contains(@class, 'bg-red-600') and contains(., 'รายงาน')])[1]", document, null, XPathResult.FIRST_ORDERED_NODE_TYPE, null).singleNodeValue.click();
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: หัวข้อปัญหา
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'คนขับขับรถเร็วเกินไป ทำให้รู้สึกไม่ปลอดภัย' into text field 'xpath=//textarea'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(., 'ส่งรายงานความปลอดภัย')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: document.evaluate("//button[contains(., 'ส่งรายงานความปลอดภัย')]", document, null, XPathResult.FIRST_ORDERED_NODE_TYPE, null).singleNodeValue.click();
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: \n[SUCCESS] Report Sent! Holding screen for 20 seconds...
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ทดสอบการส่งรายงานสำเร็จ โดยใช้ข้อมูลของคุณณัฐธเนศ (bambam)

errors.msg: Error in file '/Users/fandy/KKU 3T2/softend/PaiNamNae/sec1_group1_PaiNamNae/test/resources/keywords/auth_keywords.robot' on line 34: Resource file '../resources/keywords/auth_keywords.robot' does not exist.
